HeroSection.h2: Developing is just one step. It's essential to deeply understand the end-user's needs to achieve excellence. Pleased to meet you, my name is Lucas de Paula.

TimelineSection.title: Projects contributed
TimelineSection.subtitle: Here is a timeline of the most important projects I've contributed to in recent years.
TimelineSection.2024: Led the front-end development of the Versatus application for pricing and meteorological analysis in the Kosen Energy project. I also contributed to UX decisions, suggesting improvements in app usability and the use of filters and charts.
TimelineSection.2023.1: Developed and contributed to various internal projects at MobFintech, including real-time dashboards, large-scale data presentation, and payment API integrations for generating QR codes and Pix payments.
TimelineSection.2023.2: Gained my first experience with Vue.js, working on two projects at SPDATA. I led a front-end team in healthcare-related projects involving government API integrations. The image below is illustrative, as the projects are used internally.
TimelineSection.2022: Participated in developing the NXSuite project, a chatbot solution, where I worked on the text team, creating the interaction interface between operators and clients.

JobExperiencesSection.title: My experiences
JobExperiencesSection.subtitle: Navigating diverse environments with adaptability and professionalism.

job-1.cargo-1-description: Worked as a lead front-end developer, significantly contributing to several outsourced projects across various sectors and using a wide range of technologies.<break></break>Started by collaborating with Axis Mobfintech, where I developed projects from scratch and maintained private libraries. Notable projects included real-time dashboards and POS (point of sale) registration. All projects at Axis were built with React and TypeScript, enabling interactive and responsive interfaces.<break></break>Additionally, collaborated with Spdata on two hospital management projects using Vue.js, where I handled government system integrations, tackling technical and regulatory challenges.<break></break>One of my biggest contributions was to Versatus HPC, where I developed most of the Kosen Energy project, focused on meteorological forecasting and pricing. The main challenge was creating decoupled screen elements for reports, including various charts and filters. Each screen was designed to be dynamically generated via API, ensuring modular front-end components.
job-1.cargo-2-description: Dived into UX design and worked as a UX Designer on several projects, restructuring screens to improve usability and align the design with user needs. At Axis Mobfintech, I adjusted UX, but my standout contribution was at Versatus HPC, where I suggested and implemented significant application changes that were highly praised by the product owner for enhancing user experience and navigation.

job-2.cargo-1-description: Contributed to developing NxSuite, a SAAS chatbot platform that optimizes automatic flow creation for business-customer interactions. Initially, I worked in the real-time customer service team, building a dynamic interface with React JS and WebSocket using the Socket.IO library. I improved the interface layout, resulting in a more intuitive and efficient user experience.<break></break>Later, I led API integration and data teams, implementing external partner API integrations like VTEX and building interfaces supporting large data uploads. I mentored two junior developers, monitoring their progress until promotion.<break></break>Refactored the project code, applying functional programming and methodologies like DRY and KISS, focusing on pure functions and immutability. Introduced Atomic Design for consistent components. Identified and fixed performance issues caused by unnecessary re-renders using Ant Design, and resolved an SQL Injection vulnerability, ensuring better data security.

MyStackSection.title: My Stack
MyStackSection.subtitle: Committed to staying updated with the latest trends and techniques in development.
MyStackSection.reactjs: React is a library for building native and web user interfaces.
MyStackSection.typescript: TypeScript extends JavaScript by adding types to the language.
MyStackSection.nextjs: Used by some of the world's largest companies, Next.js allows you to build high-quality web apps with the power of React components.
MyStackSection.nodejs: Node.js® is a free, open-source, cross-platform JavaScript runtime environment for building servers, web apps, CLI tools, and scripts.
MyStackSection.aws: AWS is a cloud computing platform offered by Amazon.
MyStackSection.jest: Jest is a powerful JavaScript testing framework with a focus on simplicity.

ContactSection.title: Contact me
ContactSection.subtitle: I'm open to proposals, programming questions, and if you've worked with me, leave a message to appear as a testimonial.
